title: CineCraft: Storyteller's Edition
description: The ultimate Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric modpack crafted for cinematic storytelling, immersive roleplay, and creative video production.
body:
## Capture breathtaking scenes:
Leverage powerful cinematic tools like Replay Mod for smooth camera replays, Exposure for professional camera effects, and CameraOverhaul for dynamic motion. Bring stories to life with Motion Capture Mod and customizable NPCs using Easy NPC — complete with dialogues and animations.

### Transform your storytelling perspective:
Switch player appearances effortlessly with Skin Swapper or embody different mobs using Identity Mod for unique storytelling angles.

### Build stunning environments:
Decorate and furnish with artisan-style furniture from Macaw’s, Handcrafted, and Twigs, plus functional and atmospheric props from Supplementaries.

### Visual polish and performance:
Enjoy immersive effects like water splashes and realistic physics through Effective Mod and Physics Mod (Lite), while maintaining smooth gameplay with performance boosters like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight.

### Powerful building utilities:
Create and edit with ease using WorldEdit, Litematica, and handy tools like MiniHUD for precise placement, alongside robust keybinding management via Controlling.

### Easy mod management:
Configure and explore all installed mods in one place with Mod Menu.

# Mods
### 🎥 Cinematic & Storytelling Mods:
Mod	Purpose

Replay Mod

Exposure

Motion Capture Mod

CameraOverhaul

Overlay Creator

Easy NPC

Identity Mod

Skin Swapper	

### 🧩 Furniture & Decor Mods:
